headline: Is Index Reclassification And A New Grid JV Altering The Investment Case For Quanta Services (PWR)?
summary: In late June 2026, Quanta Services, Inc. was removed from several Russell value and midcap indexes while being added to the Russell Top 200, Russell 1000 Growth-Defensive, and Russell 1000 Defensive indexes, reflecting a reclassification toward larger-cap and more growth‑oriented benchmarks. Separately, Hyosung Heavy Industries announced a new U.S.-based gas circuit breaker joint venture with a Quanta subsidiary, expanding Quanta’s role in high-voltage grid equipment manufacturing and...

headline: Quanta Services (PWR) Joins Hyosung HICO To Build High Voltage Breakers In The US
summary: Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) and Hyosung HICO formed a new joint venture, HYOSUNG HICO BREAKER, LLC, to manufacture high-voltage circuit breakers in the U.S. The partnership focuses on high-voltage and DC technologies aimed at supporting U.S. power infrastructure and grid reliability. The move brings South Korean manufacturing capabilities into the American high-voltage circuit breaker market and supports domestic supply chain goals. For investors watching Quanta Services, the new joint...
